Surname.jp: マグノリア第43代目学長

dungeon.jp: 飛天の塔【ベリーハード】1階

description.en: Attacks an enemy, and has a <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> chance to inflict reduced <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>속도</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 감소시킵니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>スピード</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>的几率使目标的<color=#28d9ed>速度</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks an enemy.\nHas a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to inflict reduced <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>, and has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to grant a <color=#28d9ed>Barrier</color> to all allies. Barrier strength increases proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color>.
description.kr: 적을 공격합니다.\n<color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>공격력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 감소시키고, <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 아군 전체에게 <color=#28d9ed>실드</color>를 부여합니다. 실드량은 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>공격력</color>이 높을수록 증가합니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与える。\n<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間DOWNさせ、<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で味方全体に<color=#28d9ed>シールド</color>を付与する。自分の<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>が高いほどシールド量がUPする。
description.zh: 攻击敌人。\n有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率使目标的<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>,并有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率使全体友军获得<color=#28d9ed>护盾</color>效果。自身<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>越高,则护盾量越高。

name.jp: グランブルー・パニッシュメント

description.en: Attacks an enemy, and grants the caster increased <color=#28d9ed>Effectiveness</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>. \nDamage dealt increases in proportion to the number of <color=#28d9ed>debuffs</color> on the target. \nIf this attack kills the enemy, the caster gains an <color=#28d9ed>extra turn</color>.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고, 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>효과 적중</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 증가시킵니다.\n이 공격은 대상이 보유한 <color=#28d9ed>약화 효과</color>가 많을수록 피해가 증가하고, 적을 처치하면 <color=#28d9ed>추가 턴</color>을 획득합니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、自分の<color=#28d9ed>効果命中</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間UPさせる。\nこの攻撃は対象の<color=#28d9ed>弱体効果</color>の数が多いほどダメージがUPし、敵を倒した時<color=#28d9ed>追加ターン</color>を獲得する。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,使自身<color=#28d9ed>效果命中</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。\n此攻击的目标附带的<color=#28d9ed>弱化效果</color>越多,则该技能的伤害越高,且若击杀敌人,则获得<color=#28d9ed>额外回合</color>。

description.en:
(Passive Effect)
At the start of battle, grants an irremovable <color=#28d9ed>reduced damage taken</color> to all allies for <color=#28d9ed>3 turn(s)</color>.
Increases damage dealt by all attacks of all allies proportional to the number of <color=#28d9ed>debuffs</color> inflicted on the target.
When attacking, if the target is inflicted with a <color=#28d9ed>debuff</color>, recovers Weakness Gauge by <color=#28d9ed>10</color>.
After attacking, if the target is not inflicted with a <color=#28d9ed>debuff</color>, ignores <color=#28d9ed>Resilience</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Immunity</color>, and inflicts an irremovable <color=#28d9ed>Shocked</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr:
(패시브 효과)
전투 시작 시 아군 전체에게 해제되지 않는 <color=#28d9ed>피해 감소</color> 효과를 <color=#28d9ed>3턴</color> 동안 부여합니다.
아군 전체의 모든 공격은 대상이 보유한 <color=#28d9ed>약화 효과</color>가 많을수록 피해가 증가합니다.
공격 시 대상이 <color=#28d9ed>약화 효과</color>를 보유하고 있다면 WG를 <color=#28d9ed>10</color> 회복합니다.
공격 후 대상이 <color=#28d9ed>약화 효과</color>를 보유하지 않았다면 <color=#28d9ed>효과 저항</color>및 <color=#28d9ed>면역</color>을 무시하고 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 해제 불가능한 <color=#28d9ed>감전</color> 효과를 부여합니다.
description.jp:
(パッシブ効果)
戦闘開始時、味方全体に解除不可能な<color=#28d9ed>ダメージDOWN</color>効果を<color=#28d9ed>3ターン</color>の間付与する。
味方全体のすべての攻撃は対象の<color=#28d9ed>弱体効果</color>の数に応じてダメージがUPする。
攻撃時、対象に<color=#28d9ed>弱体効果</color>がある場合、WGを<color=#28d9ed>10</color>回復する。
攻撃後、対象に<color=#28d9ed>弱体効果</color>がない場合、<color=#28d9ed>効果抵抗</color>および<color=#28d9ed>免疫</color>を無視し、解除不可能な<color=#28d9ed>感電</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.zh:
(被动效果)
战斗开始时,全体友军获得无法被解除的<color=#28d9ed>伤害降低</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>3回合</color>。
全体友军的所有攻击都是目标附带的<color=#28d9ed>弱化效果</color>越多,则造成的伤害越高。
攻击时若目标附带<color=#28d9ed>弱化效果</color>,则WG恢复<color=#28d9ed>10</color>。
攻击后,若目标未附带<color=#28d9ed>弱化效果</color>,则无视目标的<color=#28d9ed>效果抵抗</color>和<color=#28d9ed>免疫</color>,并对目标造成无法被解除的<color=#28d9ed>触电</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。
